message:
feat(FJ-P2C-004-G): E2E scenario scripts with forensic replay logging

Six end-to-end scenarios covering full dispatch pipeline, transform
composition matrix, strict/hardened divergence, evidence ledger audit
trail, dispatch under load (p50/p95/p99 latency), and adversarial
input validation. Each scenario emits JSON forensic logs for replay.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
